CustomField.description: If true, the classification prompt also returns the issuing institution name (e.g. Chase, Wells Fargo) for documents of this type.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check for types where the issuing institution matters (e.g. Bank Statement → Chase, Wells Fargo). The classification prompt will ask the AI to return the source name and the splitter will include it in the saved file name.
CustomField.label: Capture Source Institution
